title: OriginiumArts
description: A mod that draws inspiration from the game Arknights's Originium Arts-related settings. It allows players to use arts units to unleash different skills and to modularly customize these units.
body:
**As this project is still in beta, please be sure to back up your work.**


**Wiki Page Here : [Wiki（the English version is being prepared）](https://azanenh37.github.io/OriginiumArtsWiki/).**



## Introduction
OriginiumArts (OGNA) is an adventure and weapons mod inspired by the Originium Arts and related settings from the game Arknights. It allows players to use a diverse range of arts units to unleash various skills within the game and to modularly customize these units.


## Mod Features
* **Operator Weapons and Skills from *Arknights* the game**
* **Skill Casting Mechanisms and Associated Functions Similar to the Original Game**
* **Modular Customization** to freely combine, match, and enhance special abilities and mechanisms for your arts units
* **Originium Terrain and preliminary processing of Originium Products** (gradually updated)
